message:
fix: resolve bugs in /tldr page components

- tldr-hero.tsx: tie AnimatedStat animations to isInView state
- tldr-synergy-diagram.tsx: remove pathLength on line elements (doesn't work),
  move gradient defs outside map loop for efficiency
- tldr-tool-grid.tsx: add aria-label to expand/collapse button for a11y

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
